rulings.Case Title: CATHOLIC CHARITIES CYO OF THE ARCHDIOCESE OF VS. PHIL HARRIS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn For Enforcement Of Settlement Agreement And Entry Of Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 19, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF CATHOLIC CHARITIES CYO OF THE ARCHDIOCESE OF Ntc Of Mtn For Enforcement Of Settlement Agreement And Entry Of Judgment Hearing Required. Declarants to be present. The Court notices that this motion is brought on a 5-day notice pursuant to an agreement. The agreement does not specify the due date for opposition or reply. These kinds of motions will be taken off calendar in the future. Under California Code of Civil Procedure the complete briefing on a motion (moving papers, opposition, and reply) has to be presented to the Court at least 5 court days before the hearing. The Court did not authorize shortening this period. = (501/CFH)
